torch_pattern: cache[0:num_users, 0:num_heads, cache_idx : cache_idx + x.shape[-2], 0 : x.shape[-1]] = x

config_template.notes: In-place update of pre-allocated KV cache at row update_idx; update_idx baked as Python constant in trace capture; MAX_SEQ_LEN must be padded to tile multiple (32). For prefill use ttnn.fill_cache; for paged/tensor-indexed updates use ttnn.experimental.paged_update_cache.

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: test: cache slice-assignment golden check; equivalently cache[batch_offset, :, update_idx, :] = cache_entry for single-token decode update; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.update_cache(cache, x, update_idx, batch_offset=batch_offset, compute_kernel_config=compute_kernel_config); constraints: {'in_place': True, 'cache_layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT', 'input_dtype_match': 'output equality (comp_equal) only guaranteed when input_dtype == cache_dtype == bfloat16; otherwise PCC check', 'decode_only': 'single-token (or tile-padded chunk) update per call; prefill path uses fill_cache'}

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [batch, num_heads, max_seq_len(tile-padded), head_dim], persistent across decode steps
placement_observations.source: call_site: per-layer pre-allocated decoder KV cache docstring — 'Stored in DRAM TILE_LAYOUT (default bfloat16). Updated in-place via ttnn.update_cache'

placement_observations.size_descriptor: shard height = num_heads * padded_layer_past_len (grows with decode position)
placement_observations.source: call_site: kv_cache_memcfg.shard_spec.shape[0] = layer_past[0].padded_shape[1] * padded_layer_past_len before update_cache; gated by model_config['l1_sharded'] in falcon-style attention

placement_observations.size_descriptor: single decode token per user: [batch, num_heads, 1(seq), head_dim]
placement_observations.source: test: xt = xt.to(device, input_mem_config); call_site: key_layer/value_layer deallocated immediately after update (transient activation)
